'''ladolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dockwalloper|dockwalloper]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-d-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dockwalloper|dockwalloper]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ladolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lædeleth|lædeleth]] || [[word:lædelej|lædelej]] || [[word:lædelesh|lædelesh]] || [[word:lædele|lædele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ladodoloth|ladodoloth]] || [[word:ladodoloj|ladodoloj]] || [[word:ladodolosh|ladodolosh]] || [[word:ladodolo|ladodolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ladoloth|ladoloth]] || [[word:ladoloj|ladoloj]] || [[word:ladolosh|ladolosh]] || [[word:ladolo|ladolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ladofloth|ladofloth]] || [[word:ladofloj|ladofloj]] || [[word:ladoflosh|ladoflosh]] || [[word:ladoflof|ladoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ladolotho|ladolotho]] || [[word:ladolojo|ladolojo]] || [[word:ladolosho|ladolosho]] || [[word:ladoloko|ladoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ladoloth|ladoloth]] || [[word:ladoloj|ladoloj]] || [[word:ladolosh|ladolosh]] || [[word:ladolo|ladolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ladolothol|ladolothol]] || [[word:ladolojol|ladolojol]] || [[word:ladoloshol|ladoloshol]] || [[word:ladolokol|ladolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ladolothotho|ladolothotho]] || [[word:ladolojojo|ladolojojo]] || [[word:ladoloshosho|ladoloshosho]] || [[word:ladoloko|ladoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ladolothon|ladolothon]] || [[word:ladolojon|ladolojon]] || [[word:ladoloshon|ladoloshon]] || [[word:ladolokon|ladolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ladolothoro|ladolothoro]] || [[word:ladolojoro|ladolojoro]] || [[word:ladoloshoro|ladoloshoro]] || [[word:ladolokoro|ladolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
